name: d2d_header_valid
description: Valid D2D header observation at reset on γ-surface: the TG-TRIAD-X anchor `{uio_out, uo_out} == 16'h47C0` must be present at every canonical reset (ui_in[0]=0). This vector is the SPEC reference for the iverilog-canonical CI job and any external D2D conformance probe.

protocol.doi_role: external citation only; not measured silicon

inputs.note: All other ui_in bits = don't-care for the anchor check.

anti_claim: If reset emits any value other than 0x47C0 on {uio_out, uo_out}, this header is INVALID.
